reviews.review_title: Fun Game, but has on major flaw
reviews.review_description:
So I'd like to preface this review by stating this is a good game, and will be great for most. The combat is simple, but solid. The map is massive, giving you hours of exploring to sink in. And there is even a roguelike built into the the game which is a nice touch, it gives you a reason to play even after beating the game.

My biggest gripe for this comes the down to the voice acting, and because of that the story. While I'm actually a fan whenever something is so bad it's good. Its just bad in this game... I think it's because it feels like the hame tries to take itself semi serious, but when you have have a script this bad it's just hard to even care.

For me to want to explore and find out more about the world, I have to care about the content behind why things are the way they are. And because of that I have to take off a star. That and I'm tired of the character yelling stuff about Sakhmet.

-Astro

Playing on Quest 3 with OS version 2.3.
The game is a lot of fun.  The combat mechanics are varied and mostly satisfying.  The progression and story development are rewarding.  And while there are performance issues with frame drops and stuttering even in the beginning, I was able to ignore it since it didn't noticeably effect the gameplay.  

Then when you reach Saga 4 in the Papyrus Swamp area,  the performance becomes a big problem with frame drops and stuttering.  As bad as it is, it's still possible to work through it and continue the game.

But as I progress through the game, the performance issues become worse and worse.  I'm currently in Saga 6 and the lag, frame drops, and crashes are present even in locations that weren't very noticeable before.  It's just not fun.  The Papyrus Swamp area is so bad now, I can't even make it through a single Corpse Eater encounter without the game crashing or frame drops that get so bad that I end up dead without even seeing what happened.  This happens even after rebooting and running nothing else but the game and loading straight into the Corpse Eater area, and my storage is less than 50% full.

As for gameplay, I feel that Saga 5 is too abrupt a change for the flow of the game where you have a new hero who for the fist time has a ranged attack that requires precise aiming (no homing), coupled with new enemies including flying ones, and basically no good places in the new location to really hone your skills since you're massively underleveled for almost all of the caves and side areas.  It's the most frustrating part of the game but once you get through it, it becomes fun again.

reviews.review_title: Great first impression - ONE BIG ISSUE
reviews.review_description:
To the developers please fix this if at all possible!

Really good first impression, awesome easthetics, action, views, story etc.

BUT as a woman I was thrilled I could choose a female protagonist, only to find out the voice and grunts and other noises are still male. Now that I think of it, is the male character introduced in the first part a companion or is that supposed to be a memory of me?? As I chose a female, this is confusing and very offputting. I cant imagine this is how its supposed to be, so I hope there is a fix soon!

Awesome game until you are quite literally forced to play as a charcter in the du'at that argueably has the worst game mechanics I've ever tried to use. Between a wonky face throwing integration to try and charge your weapon for ranged combat,  to a janky prayer bead that multifunctions as a shield, grapplehook, and some kind of crappy 3rd rate portal mechanic. Awesome game until they force you to play as this character indefinately through a saga. Literally every other companion and side character you play as have there ups and downs but are overall enjoyable to play. That last side character just seems like the devs were grasping at straws for ideas when the game could have flowed perfectly well without even adding this character. Definitely worth the playthrough until you get to this dumpster fire of a character.

This is hands down the best game that has ever come out on the quest. The visuals are stunning on the quest 3. Such a compelling story line and superb gameplay. You can spend hours upon hours playing this. If you don’t have an external battery pack, get one. You are not going to want to stop playing.

I've tried many sword fighting/combat games in VR and none of them stood out to me like this one. Physics great, story great, graphics amazing! I was disappointed when I completed it because I wanted to play longer. But I heard what happened, like hello? Why would Meta cut these developers off? Why would they do that to the best VR game in existence? AI can't beat this I'll tell you that. Like I'm confused and disappointed because that means we won't get another one. With that being said, Meta, fix this. The game is too good to shut down. (10/10 by the way)

It was so good but it’s very long and so fun the boss fights AR PEAK the combat is so good and the companions is a such good feature and this is like no other video game I have ever played in VR and it’s also like you’re combining blade and sorcery and The Walking Dead and behemoth 
￼￼￼

I loved this game, but I can’t play it anymore. I got to the place where you need to use the web sword in the desert for the first time after you got the shield I did all of the blacksmith stuff, but it just wouldn’t let me use the whip sword ￼

This is 60 bucks witch isn't cheap like for comparison that's 6k robux or idk a couple of McDonald's meals but back to the game it's confusing if u didn't play the pcvr version first and this should be 20 bucks at best

Please fix this problem: the screen remains stuck on the three dots after I press the game button (it happened to me the first time I downloaded it, then I deleted it and reinstalled it, and then it worked, and now after I progressed through the story the same thing happened).

Couldn’t imagine a better game for me, when it switches between combat, exploration, puzzles, and story.￼ all of these are engaging, fun, and change things up to keep it interesting. All the different characters are awesomely different without being so different it’s not fun or difficult to “re-learn”.
I love going right from exploring to fighting to a puzzle that actually makes me think and try things and fail till I figure it out right back to fighting and story!! Amazing set up! I would LOVE if they were able to make a third or even add the first one to META so I can play it like all my other games. Either way I’d love to see more of it.
I loved this game but if possible devs please continue the story i need to play what happens next

it is so worth trying to figure out how to play this game cuz once you get into it it is absolutely astonishing how much detail they put into this game is so fun you have to take some time to get to play but other than that it is fun fun fun this is a voice comment so just yeah there's no grammar sorry .. and yeah there might be some one star reviews it's because the in the beginning is kind of boring.
if you're looking for a running gun this is it in your game .but if you're looking for like some puzzles and a lot of action this is the game.. you can cut guy's head off and split guys in half for f sakes it's awesome the parry mechanic is awesome.. i'm playing this game more than batman and i haven't beaten batman yet so that might tell you something

I have played this game for over 16 hrs and am loving it, i highley regard the game. Though i do rrcomend the ability to switch charectors and the ability to fight more even during cutscenes like when loki comes to the hideout but i wont spoil it, devs know what im on about. Either way, love the game keep up the great work.

I mean the game is great but some puzzles Are realy hard and some of the normal enemies Are Harder than the main bosses like it took me to tries to take down sobek and 
Like it took me 7 tries to take down a level 21 mini boss

reviews.review_title: VR as it should be done!
reviews.review_description: Fantastic VR game, totally immersive storyline, engaging gameplay and goals and enormously fun combat. My favourite game that I just can't leave alone. Highly recommend.

reviews.review_title: A Must-Play VR Game for Quest Owners
reviews.review_description: I’ve completed Asgard’s Wrath II and it was a fantastic experience. The variety of heroes, different environments, and unique gameplay mechanics keep the adventure fresh and engaging. The graphics are impressive for a standalone VR game, and the world feels massive and immersive. Overall, it’s one of the best games available on Meta Quest. Highly recommended.
Way to many glitches! Can’t fix without going back to do it all over again. Very very frustrating !

I still cannot believe that this was running on the quest3, so stunning.
There is plenty to do in the game, be prepared, the fights are challenging here.
Nice story, good gameplay, great exploration, easy puzzles.
Big monsters, omg the best
I can’t get in th e game. Everytime I want to play it send me back to my main screen. It’s been going on for about 4 days now.. I used to play the game every day and now I can’t get in

I’m seeing a lot of impatient, disgruntled, and confused negative reviews on here, and for something a few hours old- that all seems pretty absurd. 

For the headset’s capabilities and power, this game meets the brief. The visuals are great, the puzzles and battles are entertaining, and the game is not without its merit. 

I'm happy to have the quest 3, I'm grateful the game came with the purchase of the headset as I probably would've waited until it was on sale to consider it on my own, and I'm enjoying myself while on the ride Wrath II has to offer.
Really laggy, bad storyline, and game controls don’t make sense. Save your money and buy something better.

reviews.review_title: This game is glitchy but good
reviews.review_description: Devs please read this the game keeps glitching on the second character we possess and the 4th one as well and please make a 3rd asgard's Wrath because we make a 3rd game because we have had norse and Egypt why not give us Chinese or Japanese or mayan actually mayan would be quite good for you lot for a 3rd game but that is some suggestions for you good luck (SPOILER ALERT TO ANYONE WHO IS READING WHO DIIDNT PLAY/MATH THE GAMR) another thing devs is I really wish we could have seen bast later on in the game in the same room with her husband as just someone to say hi to after we killed/defeated  Set/Loki because it would be nice or maybe use it in a later game since that can still work because doom stopped for a bit and look at it now so devs think about a new game because this was good

reviews.review_title: Best action adventure IMO. Great story.
reviews.review_description: Excellent!!!! Must own game!!! Please make a 3rd.

I just finished the main storyline of Asgard’s Wrath II, and I had the best time. For reference: I’m a 66-year-old woman who got her first VR (or any gaming system) this summer. I thought I’d use it mostly for virtual travel… but that makes me dizzy (bouncing cameras are problematic for me). Fighting gods and monsters, though? So much fun.

It took me quite a while to get through it, but that’s fine — I’m not on a timer.

The story? Engaging.
The characters? Loved some, hated others, but never neutral.
The graphics? I don’t “know” graphics, but I was impressed. More than once I just stood there looking at the scenery. Huge vistas, ambient music, wind blowing… okay, that wind was my fan, but it felt right standing on a cliff edge.

As a complete novice to this type of game, I found it very enjoyable. Yes, frustrating at times, but with patience (and a couple of helpful videos when I was totally baffled) even a newcomer can make it through. And if you’re worried your fighting skills aren’t good enough, don’t be, there’s a story mode if you want the adventure without the stress. It’s not a “do not die” mode, but more “don’t stay dead”. My guy died… a lot, so many on some challenges I lost count. But I still won, the game and new (to me) VR adventure. 

Thanks to everyone involved in making this game.
The game is so slow and dull, I stopped playing it pretty quick. Had it not been free I would have returned it for a refund.

THE GOOD:
-Exploring is somewhat rewarded, with "treasures" or special point of interests. But even then, you might walk for 2 minutes to find absolutely nothing there, then have to stare at the ceiling while you walk back.
-I'm sorry I can't think of anything else I enjoyed

THE BAD:
-Lots of walking, long distances in the desert with nothing between POIs
-There nothing more disappointing than opening a treasure chest and finding.. a piece of cloth. Sounds stupid? Happens all the time
-Too grindy, too many ingredients to keep track of to upgrade all your gear
-Every single battle is just an arena with edges blocked off and waves of enemies. No tactic, sneaking, sniping with arrows, just boring combat with spongy enemies
-Loading screen with tips or useful info often in a direction you are not looking
-Menu doesn't open in your face so you have to turn around to find it


THE UGLY:
-SOOO Much to keep track of, quests, sidequests, fetch quests, upgrades, rifts, characters, lore, mirrors of yourself, etc etc. The game just throws a ton of crap in your face then you always have a character telling you to open your menu and check this or that. You end up ignoring 95% of it.
-Clunky hitboxes, tried multiple time to hit under the 90% broken shield of an enemy, at his foot but the game just registered it as blocked because enemy has a shield on that side
-Spongy enemies, even a deer takes 4-5 sword hits to die
-Immortal enemies until you hit their "weak spot" doesn't do it for me, it's immersion breaking

I can go on and on gushing about how great this game is. From the story to the play mechanics, to the VR immersion. This game has it all. It is one of the best VR game ever made. It is arguably better than Half Life Alyx! It is a 70 hour plus epic adventure where you take body of four different characters and are aided by six different companions. I am thrilled with this adventure and chuckled at the throwback back to Asgards wrath one at the end. Very, very well done. 👍

Standing and waiting through the story to finally play the game, it asks me to raise my hand and tap my wrist to see the compass. I did that. I did every position i could, i pushed every button i could. But the message wouldn't disappear and let me move! For a game THIS old that's still at THIS price, a stupid glitch like that should never happen. Glad i used horizon+ to check it out. Saved myself some good money!

fighting as abraxas makes this one of the best vr games ever, the weapon loadout is exactly what you need, bosses are fun, combat is nice, the whole concept of the game is awesome, (we dont talk about cyrene)

reviews.review_title: Some of the worst puzzles ive ever seen
reviews.review_description:
Its great
Love the combat 
The story and all

But whoever programmed thise puzzles needs a stern talking to

Its not that theyre hard(they are but thats fine) its that they often make no sense
Or straight up refuse to tell you if your missing something

First of all i think it has a lot of potential but it is so mind numbingly bland. The puzzles are annoying because you have to constantly switch forms. The mortal dude cant drop 5 feet, and the combat is so uninteresting. Coming straight from batman and assassins creed this combat just feels so clunky, and there is absolutely no strategy.
Lastly for like 50% i was just standing watching stupid stuff and i couldn’t skip.
Im lucky i got it for free, because i would be so pissed if i couldn’t get a refund like some people in the reviews.

I bought this game expecting a really good experience(hence the price) the graphics weren't bad but it was absolutely crap i only got to watch for most of it then when I got to do stuff it was just trash and there are no good physics and you can only grab on certain things I deleted this slop instantly and went back to assassin's creed even 2 stars is generous for ts

I have really enjoyed this one, to the fighting physics, immersion, graphics, options. This game is really incredible. I dont get the people who say its band or not a very fun game. I think those people have terrible taste in games. Because this is really incredible. Its very well made and put together game its definitely feels complete!! I never ran into any bugs or glitches which is good I didn't even know they existed intel reading other reviews, lol. I am really impressed with this one. You know there's other titles fragments of fate, blade and sorcery, walking dead. But this one just feels way more complete and easy to play and more realistic. The faces each character has a different personality, different face shape. And i think that adds a lot of detail. The physics even just the rope not going thru different things, or the hair of some of the characters moving with how they move. It just feels really enjoyable, and Immersive. Good job devs this one's a great one!!!!!!

I have been playing virtual reality games since 2016. And I can safely say this is the best VR game I have ever played. The different combat styles with characters. The followers. The mounts the weapons. The environments. The story. And the length of the game and content to do. It is the top of the top. A must play. I can't wait for this game to Get a sequel or become an MMORPG VR game or something. But I want to see more of this game. In the future.
Took me a little over a month to beat this game 💪

reviews.review_title: Tried to like it, just found it dull.
reviews.review_description: Kinda seems like a mediocre fighting game wrapped around a vague puzzle game.  It was pretty but there isnt much to do.  The "tutorial" goes forever.  Combat feels clunky, like an old arcade game.  Everything in the levels is very "because video game" designed and nothing feels immersive or remotely natural.  Its not that its hard, there just isnt enough there to be interesting.  Tried to enjoy the game three times, telling myself that all the reviews COULDN'T be wrong...but compared to so many other titles this game is just bland in terms of gameplay.

reviews.review_title: Amazing but takes 15 minutes to boot up
reviews.review_description: this game is truly incredible i'm not sure if it's worth the $60 but so far i'm having a good time with it

This is definitely in my top 3 VR games currently. It feels like a skyrim and assassin's creed origins combination type of game. Lots to explore and a bunch of puzzles and secrets for extra loot. Although, it's completely not required to solve most of them as it's mainly for completionists/achievement hunters and for extra currency.
So much fun and it has so much things to do in this game

I’m soooo frustrated. I’ve done all requests and battled bosses and now!!!! I don’t have the travel stone to proceed with papyrus swamp!  It’s there but no travel stone. A glitch has happened and I’ve read online that these glitches exists. Sooo, I’ve tried finding a contact for developers and nothing to be found! I deal that the price they are asking for the game is crazy since there are known problems and no one fixes it!! As of now I’m stuck with nowhere to go, no game progress, no way to fix the problem and no contacting developers to fix it!!  To the developers, if you would fix my problem I can give a better review.

Just get the game. Don’t be frightened by the $60 price tag, it’s so worth it. 

A main story with about 30 hours of playtime, dungeons and caves to explore in the maps of the main story which add tens of hours to the story (completely optional because some of the caves contain extremely hard enemies), 4 characters to play as throughout the story which all have a very fun and unique playstyle, an entire ROUGELIKE MODE OUTSIDE OF THE STORY WHICH IS SUPER FUN, MIGHT I ADD, and “collectables” side-quests inside the story, which honestly I’m not a big fan of, but if you like that stuff, it’s there… 

By the way, this is coming from a quest 2 player! Sure, the game doesn’t run as good as on the quest 3, it’s expected for the game to lag when loading in a HUGE map, but if you look past performance issues, you still get all of the stuff that I mentioned! 

So, I don’t know what you’re waiting for, or why you’re still reading this review, GET THIS GAME NOW, THERE’S A REASON IT’S #1 IN BEST SELLING (as of writing this because it’s obviously not going to be #1 forever)

PS: I should warn you that this game is 32GB, so clear your system storage beforehand…


Update: So unfortunately Sanzaru, the company behind the Asgard’s wrath series and Marvel Powers United VR, has been shut down by Meta… Yeah. It’s official. I hate Meta. They basically denied us an aw3 along with other projects from Sanzaru.  So yeah. Frick Meta, they can keep throwing their money away on their stupid metaverse for all I care.

Favorite game on any platform before this it was the first one and before that it was borderlands on the xbox without a vr the first one showed me actual games could be done on the quest 2 with at pc and the 2nd one was even better and it's on the standalone great job I need a 3rd one!!!!!

I'm shocked at how this game can run so well on my Quest 2. The game is very impressive with it's VR features and functionalities. The game itself is also very fun, has a story that continues from the first, which is annoying for non-PC players, but you can catch up with the story straight from the  start. The game has a bunch of unique playable characters. I've played dozens of hours, and only just unlocked the second which is very fun with unique weapons and abilities. The first boss fight is epic. Sakhmet can do what she pleases, I don't give a d*mn. 

The followers are interesting, but the bird follower is a bit annoying, and he only really exists to deal with annoying puzzles. The puzzles are sometimes challenging, but I find them to be more of a hindrance. 

Combat is pretty good  but the weapons have no weight and don't really deliver any interesting physics, but where that fails, the rest of the game is very fun. It has A LOT of exploration, but can also be quite grindy if you're after a specific item. 

I can't not give this game a 5. It excels in almost every area, and beats most VR games in almost every department.
...and a bit overloaded, sometimes confusing (menu, game interruptions (do this to do this and this and...) Sometimes don't know the sense). But I like it. You can have fun a long,long time.

reviews.review_title: Meta put money into this, gods help us
reviews.review_description: Quite an achievement. Every annoying VR gimmick crammed into the first ten minutes and executed badly. Pointlessly big empty spaces where you have to drive your character around like a little car. To think this came out three years after Half-Life Alyxx.

Am so frustrated am stuck on Fishing Village Ruins where the second gate would not budge. I fought all there is on that level and they do not reappear so that the gate comes down. I’ve backtracked and everything trying to activate a fighting scene but it’s not working. I’ve invested so much time on this to only keep me from advancing. 😭 trying to find how to contact the creator but can’t locate.
Game is trash
Blown away by graphics and interesting characters - very interesting creatures of all kinds and a great mix of solving and battles  hard to put down - hours invested!

Fantastic action game! Reminds me a bit of God of War and Assassin's Creed. The controls are tight and responsive. The only issue is sometimes trying to pick up items I'll grab a weapon instead but I'd rather it was like that than the other way around when I need to pull a weapon. The game makes you feel powerful even early on. Loads of fun so far! This one's a keeper. I'll put it up there with Blade & Sorcery for best VR experiences I've had so far.

reviews.review_title: a puzzle game disguised as an RPG?
reviews.review_description:
First of all, I’m glad I got it for free. If not, I would have refunded it in the first 20 minutes. 

The combat is fine, I haven’t gotten to test out the RPG mechanics yet, but they seem good, and the dungeon crawling is great, although they totally copied Dungeons of Eternity (seriously, the traps, the layouts, the enemies, the loot, it’s all very similar to that game). 

But then you reach these giant puzzle rooms where your only guide is simply “Hold Y,” doing so morphs you in to a godly form, and you are now floating as a giant above your character, and you have to pick up these large vases, and stack them on a scale to activate lights, and then you have to pull on these hooks and attach them to other hooks. 

I spent about an hour figuring those out, and apparently I’m still on the tutorial, also there is an open world at some point, but by the time I finally got to see some more of the tutorial, my Quest 3 died. I hope I don’t have to solve those puzzles again, because I have no clue how I did it.

Move out of the way Skyrim, there's a new action adventure rpg in town.This game is amazing. The atmosphere, the visuals, the gameplay, the story, it's all awesome. There is so much to do and it's a great VR experience with both action packed battles and immersive experience style gameplay. The more I play this, the more I fall in love with it. The dialogue can be lengthy at times but it is still one of if not the greatest action/ adventure/ rpg game ever. It is still freshly beautiful in 2026. I highly recommend this game to anyone who enjoys elden ring style adventures with graphics that compare to red matter 2. 10/10.
Ive never played a game that good it sucks that i cant fully finish the game

reviews.review_title: Please add a no turn option
reviews.review_description: Please I have major stick drift and I really want to play this game but I can’t because I just keep spinning and spinning and it’s just unplayable ￼
This game is awesome, I'm sorry meta has been as dumb as they are, I hope you guys get a chance to do even more great work and games outside metas medium!
Im playing now its fantastic and realistic Im feeling like god in this game I just saw my own shadow its the Most realistic game I played in Meta Quest Thank you for this Meta Quest

reviews.review_title: Probably the best VR game out there
reviews.review_description: It had everything, epic battles, awesome story and exploring the Egyptian mythology. Hope they will continue the series!

reviews.review_title: Not what it should of been
reviews.review_description:
Due to hateful/abusive DMs I keep recieving from other users because of my reviews, im now editing my reviews to keep it short, 

I didn't enjoy this game due to technical reasons & bad design choices
I like the concept of the game. The visuals bring it to life, keep going ❤️

reviews.review_title: Great game but please fix the bug!
reviews.review_description: It keeps kicking me out in papyrus swamp saying “low data not able to run asgards wrath 2” or something like that. i’ve also searched up this problem and many other people are experiencing it too but otherwise this game is amazing and has  a great storyline. Also the game is kind of dark. The brightness isn’t very high and it’s very hard to see where i’m going inside the game.

reviews.review_title: Could be the best, But it's unplayable.
reviews.review_description: I was enjoying the game a lot. But it's crashing all the time now on Cyrene's part.  I've tried to reinstall it, optimizer, clean storage, nothing works. Don't know if it is a Sanzaru or Meta problem. But a lot of people are getting the same "Low Memory" problem.
So good
We need a asgards wrath 3

Easily a 5/5 star game if it was playable. Maybe not fair to the game developers if it is Meta’s fault but it doesn’t change my experience. Tried all troubleshooting steps and sometimes I can play for 30ish minutes and most times it crashes after loading screen getting out of inbetween. Would love to continue playing but idk
In my experience it is the papyrus swamp world that keeps crashing

I have almost just bought it and its already amazing. This is the game i have been looking for since i got my first quest, perfect combat, long and good story etc. I havent found any glitches like i can see other people is experiencing, but i am not that far in the story.
Its better than most meta games but dissapoint over original. You can taste the woke and anti Nord politics. Instead of the great Loki we get the liberal Woki
That’s what VR is made for!

This game gives me childhood vibes from Torok, but obviously better in many ways. I want to cry right now because I’m so happy that a VR game could keep me so hooked. I thought my gaming days were over but this game is extremely fun. please add more textures and graphics to make it more pleasing to the eyes and more game modes, and even a co-op mode.
lovely game
Good

At the start, pressing and clicking the right analog stick initiates a calibration, but then stops. I've pressed the mushroom head button countless times, and I can see that I've pressed it, but it doesn't continue.

reviews.review_title: I should have played this right away
reviews.review_description: When I got my Quest 3, I got a handful of games including this one.  I didn't play it right away, and when I finally did I instantly fell in love.  This is a full and complete VR RPG, with some of the best combat and graphics in all of VR.   I can't believe I waited several months to play one of the greatest games ever made.
This is the best game I have ever played nothing much to it. It’s pure awesomeness.

reviews.review_title: Hands down best standalone VR game.
reviews.review_description:
They said we weren't ready for this...
They were right! This game will eat your time up!
From the massive open world, powerfull gameplay, awsome puzzles and great mechanics, to it's great atmosphere very good story telling ... this game has also some secrets u must explore yourself. 
This is wat it should feel like to be a total bad@ss in VR. This game has no equal. Standalone!!! god of war mixed with zelda mixed with darksiders is what this is.
Only positives??
No , there are some stutters in the open world ( Quest 3 ) and the game isn't using Quest3 upgrades yet . Overal 9,5/10

I thought this would be a full of action game, but my 2 brain cell head can’t figure out 99.9% of mechanics. Tried to figure them out, then wasted my refund because the time limit ran out. $60 wasted because of my small brain capacity.
Best vr game i found so far

Bro this game is so fire. I have never played a vr game with such a complex graphics and gameplay. The puzzles and the narrative is so cool. I would totally recommend this game-although those 10 year olds shouldn’t get this game because the graphics when you kill something are very…graphic. 

I love this game so much I played it all the way until i had 0% on my headset cause it’s rly addictive. 

For people that havent played the first game (like me), don’t worry about it, this game gives you a good recap and you don’t really have to follow the storyline-just follow the directions they give you.

By the way it’s a little laggy and the loading screen in the beginning takes a while so just be careful and don’t press too many buttons at the same time.

This is by far the best VR game I have played. I did not want to stop playing. The graphics are awesome for the quest 3. So far the story is good. Over all a great experience and worth the discounted price.
The graphics, the story, everything in this game is first class. I absolutely love it and highly recommend it.

reviews.review_title: OMG! This game is definitely 5 Stars!
reviews.review_description: I just became an "Avatar World" person (the girl after the human guy). Just saw the world from the sky and fought God vs God. The game is so big that you actually think that the entire game will be you with an sword and an axe, but the game is in a constant charging. I feel like playing Warcraft 3 (many years ago) for the first time, but as main character. If you are a beginner or didn't even started playing yet, believe me... They were very creative!
Come on with asgards wrath 3.  This game was by far the best vr game I’ve ever seen don’t stop here.  We need more.
